Title: User Registration
Preconditions: User is not registered.
Test Data: Name: John Doe, Email: john.doe@example.com, Password: password123
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the name, email, and password.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is registered and can log in with the provided email and password.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User is registered.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is logged in and can access the application.

Title: Add Food Item
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the food items page.
2. Click the "Add Food Item" button.
3. Enter the food item name, quantity, and calories.
4. Click the "Add" button.
Expected Result: The food item is added to the user's list of food items.

Title: Edit Food Item
Preconditions: User is logged in and has added food items.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the food items page.
2. Select a food item to edit.
3. Click the "Edit" button.
4. Enter the new quantity and calories.
5. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The food item is updated with the new quantity and calories.

Title: Set Daily Calorie Goal
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the settings page.
2. Enter the daily calorie goal.
3. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The daily calorie goal is set for the user.

Title: Login with email and password
Preconditions: The user has registered previously
Test Data:
A valid email address
A valid password
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Click the "Login" button
3. Enter the email address in the provided field
4. Enter the password in the provided field
5. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: The user is logged in and can access the application

Title: Login with Google
Preconditions: The user has created a Google account
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Click the "Login with Google" button
3. Grant the application access to the Google account
Expected Result: The user is logged in and can access the application

Title: User registration
Preconditions:
The user has access to the internet
The user has a valid email address
Test Data:
A valid email address
A password
Personal data (name, surname, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Click the "Register" button
3. Enter the email address in the provided field
4. Enter the password in the provided field
5. Enter the personal data in the provided fields
6. Click the "Register" button
Expected Result: The user's data is registered in the database

Title: Search for a product
Preconditions: User has logged in
Test Steps:
1. Click on the search bar
2. Enter the product name or code
3. Click on the search button
Expected Result: The system displays a list of products that match the search criteria

Title: Modify a product
Preconditions: User has at least one product in the refrigerator
Test Data: New product details (name, price, expiration date, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Click on the product to be modified
2. Click on the "Modify" button
3. Enter the new product details
4. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The product details in the database are updated with the new information

Title: Sell a product
Preconditions: User has at least one product in the refrigerator
Test Steps:
1. Click on the product to be sold
2. Click on the "Sell" button
Expected Result: The product is added to the list of products available for purchase

Title: Add a new product
Preconditions: User has a product with a valid code and expiration date
Test Data: Product details (name, price, expiration date, etc.)
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Add Product" button
2. Enter the product details
3. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The product is added to the database and appears in the user's refrigerator

Title: Remove a product
Preconditions: User has at least one product in the refrigerator
Test Steps:
1. Click on the product to be removed
2. Click on the "Remove" button
3. Confirm the removal
Expected Result: The product is removed from the database and no longer appears in the user's refrigerator

Title: View messages
Preconditions: User has logged in
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Messages" icon
Expected Result: The system displays the list of chats the user has had with other users

Title: Search for a user in messages
Preconditions: User has logged in
Test Data: Username of the person to search for
Test Steps:
1. Enter the username in the search bar
2. Click on the search button
Expected Result: The system displays the chat history with the searched user, if it exists

Title: View another user's profile
Preconditions: User has searched for another user in the messages
Test Steps: 1. Click on the searched user's name in the chat list
Expected Result: The system displays the other user's profile

Title: Send a message
Preconditions: User has searched for another user in the messages
Test Steps:
1. Click on the chat with the searched user
2. Enter the message content
3. Click on the "Send" button
Expected Result: The message is sent and appears in the chat history

Title: Edit user profile
Preconditions: User has logged in

1. Click on the "Profile" icon

3. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The user's profile is updated with the new information
